Amber-jungle: Glowing amber light filters through emerald canopy, casting deep shadows with flecks of golden sunlight.
Volcanic-red-gray: Crimson lava flows meet slate ash clouds, ember sparks dance against consuming shadow.
Misty-blue-green: Blue mist rolls through forest green ferns, touched by silver moisture and pale gold dawn.
Ancient-sepia: Burnt umber earth meets warm cream sky, faded bronze tones evoke fossilized memory.
Dramatic-storm: Charcoal clouds dominate with single amber break of distant sunlight piercing deep blue atmosphere.
Cretaceous-dawn: Rose pink sky meets mint green foliage, cream mist drifts through deep forest silhouettes.
Carboniferous-swamp: Deep green water reflects brown vegetation, mist grey fog glows with amber trapped light.
Triassic-desert: Rust orange rocks scatter across tan sand, shadow brown valleys beneath pale sky expanse.
Volcanic-night: Black volcanic rock glows with red ember light, ash grey smoke drifts through darkness.
Tar-pit: Black tar bubbles meet brown sediment, amber resin pools within consuming deep shadow depths.
Dusk-crimson: Crimson sky bleeds into silhouette dinosaurs, shadow purple descends across ancient horizon.
Jurassic-coast: Turquoise waves crash on sand beaches, volcanic black cliffs frame vibrant palm green.
Feathered-raptor-warm: Copper plumage catches light on cream underbelly, shadow depths meet warm green undergrowth.

Storm-crashing: Charcoal tempest splits with lightning white strikes, deep blue rain sheets obscure landscape.
Primordial-twilight: Violet dusk merges with silver starlight, deep blue water reflects emerald jungle edge.
